page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for parallel computing workloads. It features 64 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors operating at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 256 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the instance bundles eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, delivering a combined 128 GB of high-bandwidth video memory.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng single-core and gzip compression benchmarks. However, multi-core execution is robust, with bzip3 multi-threaded decompression scoring in the top 25% at 200.07 GB/sec. Memory bandwidth remains stable, measuring 121.44 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 48.0 GB/sec for write operations. Network throughput is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 20 Gbps.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external storage solutions for persistent data. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware profile is tailored for high-density GPU compute tasks rather than general-purpose single-threaded processing. The combination of eight dedicated GPUs and 64 physical cores makes this server suitable for deep learning training, parallel scientific simulations, high-performance computing, and multi-threaded data processing workloads.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores from Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz, paired with 256 GB of system memory. The primary hardware highlight is the inclusion of eight NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs, providing a total of 128 GB of VRAM. While single-core performance benchmarks are weak, the instance excels in multi-threaded operations, as evidenced by a strong bzip3 multi-threaded decompression throughput of 200.07 GB/sec. It offers a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth but lacks local storage. This hardware profile is optimized for parallel computing, deep learning, and high-performance multi-threaded workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs with 128 GB VRAM for high-performance parallel computing.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.16xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server with 64 Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs.
tagline: A high-density GPU acceleration platform featuring eight dedicated graphics processors for demanding parallel computing and multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Eight bundled NVIDIA Volta V100 GPUs providing 128 GB of total VRAM
64 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors
256 GB of system memory and 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong multi-threaded performance, highlighted by high bzip3 decompression throughput
No local storage included, requiring external storage attachments
Designed for deep learning, parallel scientific simulations, and multi-threaded processing
